title: IACUC — Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)
content:
The Morgan State University IACUC publishes a comprehensive set of 50+ Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) governing every aspect of animal-care and use at the Animal Research Facility (ARF). Each SOP is a downloadable PDF. The current list (numbering is non-contiguous; SOP 37 is currently not published):

Supporting documents:
- 2-Factor Authentication (2FA) Self Enrollment - Push Notifications
- Biological Safety Manual and Exposure Control Plan
- Emergency Declaration and Point of Contact Call List

IACUC SOPs:
- SOP 1.2: Training Requirements
- SOP 2.2: Rodent Import Procedure
- SOP 3.2: Anesthesia and Analgesia
- SOP 4.2: Hazards in the Animal Facility
- SOP 5.2: Animal Purchasing (procurement policy for animal purchasing and purchasing lab supplies)
- SOP 6.2: Animal Receiving
- SOP 7.2: Rodent Breeding (Mice)
- SOP 8.2: Waste Management
- SOP 9.2: Cage Labeling and Record Keeping
- SOP 10.2: Cage Washer Procedures
- SOP 11.2: Chemical Waste
- SOP 12.2: Access to Controlled Substances
- SOP 13.2: Dead Animal and Carcass Disposal Procedures
- SOP 14.2: Cleaning Procedures for Personnel Areas
- SOP 15.3: Emergency and Disaster Plan
- SOP 16.2: Environmental Enrichment
- SOP 17.3: Euthanasia — Use of alternative to CO2 Euthanasia
- SOP 18.2: Animal Transport Procedures
- SOP 19.2: General MSU Waste Management Information
- SOP 20.2: Rodent Husbandry and Training for Animal Facility Personnel
- SOP 21.1: Identification of Animals
- SOP 22.2: Rodent Export Procedures
- SOP 23.2: Non-Pharmaceutical Grade Drugs
- SOP 24.2: Management of Mouse Breeding Colonies
- SOP 25.2: Ordering and Receiving Feed and Bedding
- SOP 26.2: Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)
- SOP 27.2: Pharmaceutical Drugs
- SOP 28.2: Animal Facility Access
- SOP 29.2: Rodent Quarantine
- SOP 30.2: Occupational Health Program
- SOP 31.2: General Cleaning Procedures
- SOP 32.2: Sentinel Procedures (Routine Sentinel Procedures in Microisolator Facilities — Animal Surveillance)
- SOP 33.2: Separation of Rodents for Overcrowding or Fighting
- SOP 34.2: Survival Surgery
- SOP 35.2: Use and Monitoring of Cabinet Cage Washer
- SOP 36.2: Health Checks and Veterinary Clinical Calls
- SOP 38.2: Water Testing
- SOP 39.2: Weekend and Holiday Care
- SOP 40.2: Working with Microisolator Cages using Aseptic Techniques
- SOP 41.2: Access to Animal Housing
- SOP 42.2: Post-Approval Monitoring and Protocol Renewal
- SOP 43.2: Parasite Treatment
- SOP 44.2: Rodent Cage Density Policy
- SOP 45.2: Satellite Areas
- SOP 46.2: Laboratory Safety
- SOP 47.2: Vendor Health Report Review
- SOP 48.1: IACUC Procedures for Protocol Review
- SOP 49.1: IACUC Procedures for Semiannual Review
- SOP 50.1: IACUC Appointment of Members
- SOP 51.1: IACUC Responsibilities

All SOP PDFs are hosted under /Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/ora/Animal Research/SOPs/. Direct PDF URLs are exposed individually on the IACUC SOPs page. Researchers should consult the relevant SOP before initiating procedures and contact the IACUC office (Dr. Ingrid Tulloch, Director, Ingrid.Tulloch@morgan.edu) for clarification.

key_facts.sop_numbering_skips: SOP 37 not published; numbering jumps from 36 to 38
supporting_documents: Biological Safety Manual and Exposure Control Plan
Emergency Declaration and Point of Contact Call List
